TestCaseInfo.TestDescription: Verify that CLI -c parameter opens CLI(Deprecated)
TestCaseInfo.UserStory: TOOL-2371 (CLI Deploy - Triggering UI vs CLI)
TestCaseInfo.TestCaseHeader: Verify that CLI -c parameter opens CLI

VerifyCLIMessage.MessageText: Usage: csdu.cmd -c [options] [command]Options:  -c, --cli             open CLI version of application  -u, --user-interface  open UI version of application  -h, --help            display help for command  -v, --version         output of the version number  Commands:  deploy [options]      deploy control system  help [command]        display help for commandFor more information enter:csdu.cmd -c [command] --help
